item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: A Caturday story.
item.description: I may not be an old woman, but of my 6 cats, one was a gift, one I rescued from a drug house, two were abandoned after being left in my care, 1 was a feral cat one of the others brought home, and the latest was abandoned by a former tenant of my landlord's. He figured I knew something about cats. EDIT: Thanks for making this one go viral. For all of you complaining about the tears, just think every time I read your comments, I tear up as well. FWIW, I have several rescues and posted their stories the other day: https://imgur.com/gallery/tNse54i Check them out as they are my best companions and the reason why I get out of bed every afternoon. (I've always been a knight owl)
item.dc:creator: Swiggy1957

item.title: “Was my position eliminated or not?”
item.description: FP EDIT: Yay! Front Page! I just wanted to add that I’ve never worked in food service but after watching the movie ‘Waiting…’ and more recently the Hulu series ‘Bear’ I have a new found respect for everyone that works in the restaurant industry. I’ve always known it’s difficult for all restaurant staff but was clueless as to how much work really goes into running a restaurant. Especially through the pandemic. So if you are in that line of work, hats off to you and thanks for all you do!
item.dc:creator: dorenavant

item.title: What kind of witchery is this?!
item.dc:creator: IdontEatBooty

item.title: Ten amazing movies you might not have seen!
item.description:
Layer Cake A successful cocaine dealer gets two tough assignments from his boss on the eve of his planned early retirement. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0375912/
Sunshine 50 years into the future, the Sun begins to die, and Earth is dying as a result. A team of astronauts are sent to revive the Sun - but the mission fails. Seven years later, a new team are sent to finish the mission as they are Earth's last hope. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0448134/
The Fountain Spanning three parallel stories over a millennium, 'The Fountain' is a story of love, death, spirituality, and the fragility of our existence in this world. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0414993/
Tucker and Dale vs Evil Two lovable West Virginian hillbillies, are headed to their "fixer-upper" vacation cabin to drink some beer, do some fishin', and have a good time. But when they run into a group of preppy college kids who assume from their looks that they must be in-bred, chainsaw wielding killers, Tucker & Dale's vacation takes a bloody & hilarious turn for the worse. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt1465522/
Unthinkable A psychological thriller centered around a black-ops interrogator and an FBI agent who press a suspect terrorist into divulging the location of three nuclear weapons set to detonate in the U.S. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0914863/
Kiss Kiss Bang Bang A murder mystery brings together a private eye, a struggling actress, and a thief masquerading as an actor. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0373469/
The Assassination of Jesse James by the Coward Robert Ford Robert Ford, who's idolized Jesse James since childhood, tries hard to join the reforming gang of the Missouri outlaw, but gradually becomes resentful of the bandit leader. https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0443680/
City of God Two boys growing up in a violent neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro take different paths: one becomes a photographer, the other a drug dealer. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0317248/
Closer The relationships of two couples become complicated and deceitful when the man from one couple meets the woman of the other. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0376541/
Children of Men In 2027, in a chaotic world in which women have become somehow infertile, a former activist agrees to help transport a miraculously pregnant woman to a sanctuary at sea. http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0206634/

item.title: Lala
item.description: Clearly, people aren’t the only ones who thought Lala did a good job. Because many cats enjoy watching their owners play Stray. Both humans and their felines friends have quickly fallen in love with the game and the cats in it, and of course Lala helped that play a role in that when she appeared in the voice with her extraordinary performance. We don’t know yet whether Lala plans to continue voice acting in future projects, but we really hope that she does. #current_events #mildly_interesting #mildly_amusing #cats #animals #gaming #cool

item.description: Still one of the greatest things I've received in the mail, so I have it hanging on my wall
item.dc:creator: noticemesensei

item.title: Crime of Century - Global Warming Denial plot by Big Oil
item.description:
Source: https://www.bbc.com/news/science-environment-62225696
This whole scheme is how the Petroleum Industry conspired to manage the message and convince legislators and people around the world that climate change is only a natural process and not man-made. Many millions of people and most importantly most Republican Senators still believe this, which has led to total inaction by the US. We’ve run out of time, as record temps around the world and Greenland losing 6 billion tons of glacial ice PER DAY. If you care at all about the future of Earth, call your states Republican Senators especially and demand that they join in on bipartisan legislation and action by the US. We also need pressure on Joe Manchin. These are desperate times and as this article reveals, Industry did everything they could to hide it and prevent action. Thank you! Your phone call is much more important than your vote!
Cat tax
item.dc:creator: DaveSamsonite

item.dc:creator: DizzleSenpai

item.title: Slow-mo trainwreck incoming
item.description: Follow-up to my last post (https://imgur.com/gallery/BxWFAae). Thanks for everyone who commented there and sent messages. I called a lawyer...there's nothing really to do...where I am we have no-fault and community property. There's nothing to sway custody either way, so will likely be 50/50 or close. I made an appointment with a therapist, but haven't had it yet. I'm currently on a family trip for the end of summer and it pretty much sucks. I knew it would be tough, but it's pretty bad. Tensions are super high and I'm trying to be there for the kids, but they're acting out because I think they can sense the tensions are high. I'm going to break it to my wife when I get home from work on Monday. Going to ask for 3-month trial separation...to re-evaluate our goals and where we are. I've already looked for rooms to rent around my town. I can afford that no problem, thankfully. I've written out a plan for how we should evaluate the 3 months and how we should handle the kids. I've written down the questions we need to explore. I don't actually think reconciliation will be possible, and I feel awful for leaving the possibility of hope there. I'm terrified that my kids won't understand. I'm terrified that my wife won't understand. I'm terrified that my family won't understand. I'm terrified my coworkers and friends won't understand. I'm terrified that the universe will punish my cruelty. But I have to do it. I need to find happiness for myself and my wife needs to find it for herself. Thank you for your ears, anonymous Internet strangers.
item.dc:creator: everythingisawful123

item.title: Found a cactus growing out of a tollway road in Dallas
item.description:
Pretty high up. A local photographer has already named it "Pointy McPointFace" Can be seen to the left of the Oaklawn exit north of Downtown Dallas on the Dallas Tollway. According to some friends its been growing for 6 years
Blurry bell cat tax

item.title: ? FIRST THE CAME FOR THE TRANS PEOPLE ?
item.description:
https://twitter.com/esqueer_/status/1550133739732099073?s=21&t=xNFmFwsNQU1e90-cSlheMA
Links to all of the relevant docs. Notice of hearing: https://ww10.doh.state.fl.us/pub/medicine/Agenda_Info/Public_Information/Notices/2022/August/08052022_FB_Notice.pdf Agenda for hearing: https://ww10.doh.state.fl.us/pub/medicine/Agenda_Info/Public_Information/Agendas/2022/August/08052022_FB_Agenda.pdf The public book basis for their "evidence". https://ww10.doh.state.fl.us/pub/medicine/Agenda_Info/Public_Information/Public_Books/2022/August/08052022_FB_Publicbook.pdf
